data.title: Big Brains, Tiny Models: Spain’s Multiverse Computing Bags $215M to Shrink AI for Smartphones
data.description:
Multiverse Computing claims its quantum-inspired compression tech can get large AI models like Llama-2 to fit on a smartphone.
source: https://decrypt.co/324914/spains-multiverse-bags-215m-shrink-ai-smartphones

data.title: Trump will attend the US National Security Council meeting at 23:00 tonight
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: The White House issued an announcement stating that US President Trump will attend a National Security Council meeting at 11 a.m. Eastern Time (23:00 Beijing Time).

data.title: Trump Pledges to Establish Clear Market Framework for Cryptocurrency
data.description: According to Odaily, U.S. President Donald Trump recently stated that creating a Bitcoin strategic reserve is insufficient. He vowed to establish a 'clear and simple market framework' to ensure the United States maintains its leadership in Bitcoin and cryptocurrency.

data.title: Whale Address Acquires Additional 2,825 ETH in OTC Transaction
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, Lookonchain monitoring has revealed that a whale or institutional address, potentially linked to ConsenSys, purchased 2,825 ETH through an over-the-counter (OTC) transaction. This acquisition, valued at approximately $7.48 million, occurred four hours ago.

Over the past two weeks, this address has accumulated a total of 160,736 ETH, equivalent to around $421 million. The average cost of these acquisitions is approximately $2,620 per ETH.

data.title: FTX/Alameda address unstaked and transferred 188,000 SOL, worth about $31.5 million
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to the monitoring of on-chain analyst Ember, FTX/Alameda distributed 188,000 SOL (about 31.5 million US dollars) redeemed from staking to 30 addresses 7 hours ago. According to historical records, these addresses that received SOL will subsequently transfer assets to Coinbase or Binance.
Since November 2023, FTX/Alameda staking addresses have cumulatively redeemed and transferred out 8.407 million SOL (about 1.094 billion US dollars) in a similar manner, with an average transfer price of 130 US dollars. At present, FTX/Alameda staking addresses still have 5.046 million SOL (about 726 million US dollars) in staking status.

data.title: The Blockchain Group Completes €9.7 Million Funding, Expands Bitcoin Vault Strategy
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: The Blockchain Group (ALTBG), Europe's first Bitcoin vault company, has completed financing of approximately 9.7 million euros, with major investors including Adam Back, TOBAM and Ludovic Chechin-Laurans. Among them, TOBAM subscribed to 6 million euros of convertible bonds with a conversion premium of 30%; Ludovic Chechin-Laurans invested 2.4 million euros in the form of Bitcoin; Adam Back converted all of his first-phase bonds into 14.9 million shares of ALTBG and subscribed for an additional 2.1 million shares. This financing is expected to increase the company's holdings by approximately 80 bitcoins, and the total reserve will reach 1,611. (Bitcoin Magazine)

data.title: The suspected ConsenSys-related address bought another 2,825 ETH through OTC 4 hours ago
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to Lookonchain monitoring, a whale/institution (possibly related to ConsenSys) address purchased another 2,825 ETH (about $7.48 million) through OTC 4 hours ago.
In the past two weeks, the address has received a total of 160,736 ETH (about $421 million), with an average cost of about $2,620.

data.title: Remixpoint Increases Bitcoin Holdings with Significant Purchase
data.description: According to PANews, Japanese publicly traded company Remixpoint announced on June 12 that it has acquired an additional 55.68 bitcoins for 887.3 million yen. The average purchase price was 15.935 million yen per bitcoin. As of now, the company holds a total of 981.39 bitcoins, valued at approximately 13.3 billion yen based on the current market rate.

data.title: A whale increased its long position in ETH through Aave revolving loans, holding a total of 23,786 AETHWETH
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to The Data Nerd, 15 minutes ago, the whale address starting with 0x109 borrowed 5 million USDT from Aave and bought 1,844 ETH (about 4.6 million US dollars).
Afterwards, the address deposited all these ETH into Aave, and currently there are a total of 23,786 AETHWETH in his wallet.

data.title: Trump: Creating a strategic Bitcoin reserve is not enough, the United States also needs a clear and simple crypto market framework
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Trump said in his latest speech that creating a strategic reserve of Bitcoin is not enough, and vowed to establish a "clear and simple market framework" to ensure the United States' dominance in Bitcoin and cryptocurrency. (Cointelegraph)

data.title: Iran's state TV: Revolutionary Guard leader may be dead
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News - Iranian state television reported that General Salami, commander of Iran's paramilitary Revolutionary Guard, was feared killed in an Israeli attack. The station added that another senior guard official and two nuclear scientists may also have died. The report did not provide other details. (Associated Press)

data.title: Coinbase CEO: Congress should pass the CLARITY Act and the GENIUS Act together
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Coinbase CEO Brian Armstrong wrote on the X platform that we need a comprehensive regulatory framework covering all types of digital assets. Congress should pass the CLARITY Act and the GENIUS Act together to make them into law. 52 million American cryptocurrency holders are looking forward to it.
Related readings on the CLARITY Act: Interpretation of the US CLARITY Act, a major step in clarifying digital asset regulation; Related readings on the GENIUS Act: The GENIUS Act is expected to pass the Senate, and stablecoin regulation will usher in a historic breakthrough

data.title: Israel launches second wave of air strikes on Iran
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: According to BNO News, Israel launched a second wave of air strikes on Iran, and explosions were heard in many cities.

data.title: U.S. Stock Futures Experience Significant Decline
data.description: According to BlockBeats, market data indicates that U.S. stock index futures have seen an increased decline, with Nasdaq futures dropping by 2%.

data.title: Israeli Prime Minister Netanyahu Targets Iranian Nuclear Sites in Airstrikes
data.description: According to BlockBeats, Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu has announced that the main uranium enrichment facility in Iran's Natanz region is a target for Israeli military airstrikes. Witnesses have reported hearing multiple explosions in Natanz. Netanyahu stated that the airstrikes are aimed at disrupting the research work of Iran's leading nuclear scientists on nuclear weapons. Additionally, the Israeli military has targeted the core of Iran's ballistic missile program.

data.title: U.S. stock index futures extended losses, with Nasdaq futures down 2%
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily reported that market conditions showed that the decline in U.S. stock index futures widened, with Nasdaq futures falling by 2%.

data.title: Gold rose 1.22% during the day, while Bitcoin's intraday decline widened to 2.15%
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily reported that the market showed that gold rose 1.22% during the day, while Bitcoin's daily decline widened to 2.15%.

data.title: Iraq Closes Airspace and Suspends Air Traffic
data.description: According to BlockBeats, the Iraqi National News Agency has reported that Iraq has closed its airspace and suspended all air traffic at its airports. This decision affects both domestic and international flights, although further details on the duration or reasons for the closure have not been disclosed.

data.title: SEC Withdraws Key Regulatory Proposals Under Gensler Era
data.description: According to Foresight News, the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) has withdrawn several regulatory proposals from the era of Gary Gensler. These include the expanded Custody Rule and Rule 3b-16, among others. The expanded Custody Rule aimed to encompass all client assets, including cryptocurrencies, broadening the definition of 'custody' and raising concerns about whether certain state-chartered entities should be considered qualified custodians. Rule 3b-16 proposed treating decentralized finance (DeFi) exchanges and platforms as national securities exchanges for regulatory purposes. Additionally, the SEC has abandoned the proposal requiring listed companies to adhere to enhanced ESG reporting requirements.

data.title: Solana Proposal Aims to Enhance Blockchain Efficiency with Asynchronous Execution
data.description:
According to PANews, Solana developer Max Resnick has submitted a proposal, SIMD-301, to introduce asynchronous execution capabilities to the blockchain. This proposal seeks to allow validator nodes to vote before the completion of block transaction execution, significantly reducing block confirmation times. It also sets the stage for future developments in multi-leader concurrency (MCL) and pipelined consensus mechanisms.

Key changes outlined in the proposal include the removal of the BankHash field from the voting structure, the introduction of a static block validation check mechanism, and enabling validator nodes to vote after passing static checks without waiting for transaction execution to complete. The proposal emphasizes the need to prevent malicious nodes from submitting time-consuming transactions that could result in empty blocks.

The asynchronous execution feature will be activated in phases through a feature flag and is expected to be deployed following the completion of the Alpenglow upgrade.
